textByHash.3e14593067ed67c5cb9bd3a906e66fa30719dce7: Granddad's fruit farm. It's a right dump. This whole corner of the city is a dump.
textByHash.36461f4959829fee0d9ebc09349f57acdb1a9ef8: My cow of a sister kicked me out of her bar. Said I was getting the place a bad name. So I'm staying here until I'm old enough to get my own place.
textByHash.6f1b7f462329ef0f63a05c01dda6c36d419592aa: I want to move to Arceuus. It's properly awesome up there. I'll do bartending or something until I can learn to be a necromancer.
textByHash.bcd624d3b04b5a0e4d4cc6ee591aec4945e90f3d: Anyway, why are you here? Do you want something?
textByHash.792e69e1e08c54c6fd2dcca84f5198215a2fdda9: Yeah, you're in the biggest dumpster of Dumpsterville. Now you know. Anyway, do you want something?
textByHash.44686cd4a467cc191a93566678b7517e00bb0b48: I am Bologa Gricoller, seeker of forbidden wisdom, wanderer of the dark pathways, thinker of the unthinkable. I can do bartending too.
textByHash.0b0baa620c21bd2a9a9e59f9acddd85d6cf7acf8: I used to work at The Golden Field. That's my sister's bar. It's mostly farmhands drinking there, but you get some interesting people as well.
textByHash.7efb32b6da4d41a131e7c3c3c0c9f1d14b19cd30: See, most Hosidius people are Saradominists. My sister, she's always listening to Father Jean at the church with his goodie-goodie sermons.
textByHash.684b1391be572e803e4cd88ad08dd555e3116a08: But some of us in the bar thought we'd give Zamorak a try. Like, you gotta be open-minded, right? What did Saradomin ever do for us anyway?
textByHash.2b1214a1d3d8eb5869462177a9d982581238253c: So we'd meet in the bar, sharing books that the Piscarilius smugglers would bring us, learning what the Saradominists don't want us to know.
textByHash.64812eb7794f2e9acb118847998c9b369ef8899f: Anyway, my sister - she's a right cow, by the way - she fired me and kicked me out. Said I was bringing bad sorts to her bar.
textByHash.6a7f2a4a320c05cb6f92a1a7cf7c0ca0b1c2d37b: Bad sorts, she said! Like, morality is totally subjective, right? So who's she to call us bad sorts just 'cos we're not afraid to think differently?
textByHash.68b2af5f74ea27c22903131921466e1bdf4a289e: Anyway, I've learnt all this cool stuff about Zamorak, and being stuck in a fruit farm doesn't stop me being his loyal servant, right?
textByHash.fa2316c4bd4c883b19cd27ac886a4330fc4c8e0d: In fact I've invented a Zamorakian blessing that works on fruit! You can use it to make Zamorak's wine out of grapes from the Vinery.
textByHash.491d7a22f0a19219e3122c6a94e78938f6d93933: I'll let you have access to the Zamorakian blessing I invented, so you can invoke Zamorak's unholy power upon the grapes... if I think you're up to it.
textByHash.2ce9700169735823533d9e0f67fc6ba473c44a50: Nah, I bet you couldn't even bless an unholy symbol - you're not going to get very far with my grape blessing.
textByHash.2fcd8fe51ef83f4e087ff47fd3714f0efd86f1bb: Not likely - I can see from your kit that you're supporting other gods. Dress Zamorakian if you want to impress me. And I'll still want 75,000 coins.
textByHash.e044491e10b27471859a7e7b010cc3ef74fc15d4: You don't look much like a Zamorakian to me. Dress Zamorakian if you want my help. And I'll still want 75,000 coins.
textByHash.74a3f04f5a6ac36b228d0db7739acdb1d98703a0: Yeah, I guess you'll do. But I want 75,000 coins. One day I'll need to buy my own house, y'know!
textByHash.612a4255a913d3ff5684ed344f9bce24c0f7656f: Here's how it works... I'll write the blessing on scrolls. You need to carry some of the scrolls when you're harvesting grapes.
textByHash.195d5c00825ad5caadb9b9fc30a1af62bdac4ef0: As each fruit is severed from its stem, it begins to die. That's the moment of vulnerability when Zamorak's unholy power can infest it.
textByHash.5b3ad46b3b0fe9fd4b4a645e53c01d9af599c9df: The power consumes the scroll on which the blessing is written, so you'll need one for each grape. I suggest you take a stack of blessings with you.
textByHash.b39156c738e486a1f09bfd960e3c0a8e1326bcaa: By the way, Lord Zamorak's chaotic power is quite volatile. You'll likely get a smaller harvest from your vine if you're using these blessings.
textByHash.fdb62f42112a4449b4dec6651f3f0767e81a4c69: I'll give the scrolls to Granddad downstairs. You can get them off him as a reward if you work on his farm. Hey, it's a dump, but he's family. So, do you accept?
textByHash.73c47d3017879d7dc3aa354d847701ce080a7ecc: Yeah, I've invented a blessing that invokes Zamorak's unholy power upon the grapes, so Zamorak's wine can be made from them.
textByHash.ea08590b284419c39fa019aeb8dc9c93b6e1406c: But I won't let you use it unless I think you're up to it. Also, I want 75,000 coins.
textByHash.ae35a32b7445f71f69e81f96dc8e817b9cebfed6: It's really nice of you to take an interest...
textByHash.402ae28f787bdc31f5afd374d2f0d4fd18dca751: My blessing is written on scrolls. You need to carry some of the scrolls when you're harvesting grapes.
textByHash.b2732e4a26e32f6db69aab1b68064a59eed1255d: I've given the scrolls to Granddad downstairs. You can get them off him as a reward for working on his farm. The place may be a dump, but he's family.
textByHash.f439bd0b1759c20facada2ca046d130d773e2c7a: Yeah, okay. It's nice of you to ask...
textByHash.fab83cc6ae7cc725037927a1c09bef0bef8f80ca: So that's how I came to invent that Zamorakian blessing for making Zamorak's wine out of grapes from the Vinery.
